snapshotBackup.title: Backup & restore
snapshotBackup.desc: Create a restorable ZIP snapshot for recovery, migration, or rollback. This is the only backup entry point.

liteBackup.title: Lite backup
liteBackup.desc: Keeps chats, settings, memories, and Paint metadata; skips attachment and image binaries, and removes related attachment references.

sync.title: Multi-device sync
sync.desc: Merge current state such as assistants, topics, and messages across devices. It does not create backups and cannot be used for rollback recovery.
sync.never: Multi-device sync has not run yet.
sync.lastSuccess: Last success: {{time}}, merged {{merged}} topics; this does not create a backup

remoteBackups.restoreConfirmDesc: This will replace local data with “{{name}}”, including chats, settings, memories, and other data in the backup.

viewDataDialog.title: View data
viewDataDialog.desc: Shows a local-only overview of data stored in localStorage / chrome.storage.local / IndexedDB.

deleteFilesDialog.title: Clear knowledge memory?
deleteFilesDialog.desc: This will clear knowledge-memory data and cannot be undone. Chat attachments and Paint images are not deleted.

clearCacheDialog.title: Clear cache?
clearCacheDialog.desc: Clears CacheStorage and other caches. Chats and settings will not be deleted.

resetDialog.title: Reset all data?
resetDialog.desc: This will remove chats, attachments, memories, model configs, and sync configs stored locally. This cannot be undone.

toast.restoreDone: Restore completed (chat data refreshed; reopen settings to load the latest config).

localBackup.title: Local snapshot backup
localBackup.dirDesc: Optional: after granting a directory, each new backup snapshot will also be exported as a ZIP file (best-effort).
localBackup.dirDescUnsupported: This browser does not support picking a directory. Snapshots will only be stored locally (IndexedDB) and can be downloaded in “Manage backup snapshots”.
localBackup.manageDesc: Snapshots are stored in the browser’s IndexedDB. You can restore, download, or delete them here.

status.autoDisabledDesc: After enabling, the first automatic snapshot runs after one full interval.
status.nextRunAt: Next around {{time}}; the browser may delay it because of sleep or resource scheduling.
status.nextRunPending: Waiting for the background schedule; the first run is not immediate.
status.never: Automatic snapshots have not run yet.
status.cleaned: Cleaned up {{count}} old backup snapshots in this run
status.fileExportDegraded: Directory export needs reauthorization; the snapshot was still saved to local IndexedDB.
status.fastFullBackupWarning: A 5-minute automatic snapshot is not guaranteed to run exactly on time. Full backups can increase background export cost; use lite backup or a longer interval.
status.queryFailed: Unable to read the background auto snapshot schedule

detail.title: Auto snapshot failure details
detail.desc: Shows readable diagnostics recorded by the automatic task. Copy the full diagnostics when you need to share them for troubleshooting.
detail.empty: This failure record does not contain more technical details. It will refresh after the next automatic run.

notes.reasonCodeMissingLegacy: This is an older failure record. The automatic task only saved a generic error and did not save a reason code. If the next automatic snapshot still fails, it will write the real reason code.
notes.statusMissingDetail: This failure status is missing details because it was written by an older path. It will refresh after the next automatic task.

reasonCodes.backup_format_detail_missing: Older failure record is missing the concrete reason code. The next automatic snapshot will write the real reason.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_export_domain_flush_faile: Failed to flush pending writes for a backup domain.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_export_domain_export_fail: Failed to export a backup domain.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_export_domain_validate_fa: Failed to validate a backup domain.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_export_domain_encode_fail: Failed to encode a backup domain.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_export_domain_manifest_fa: Failed to generate the backup domain manifest.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_app_version_missing: The backup manifest is missing the app version.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_domain_blob_path_invalid: A backup domain contains an invalid attachment path.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_json_entry_missing: The backup archive is missing a required JSON file.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_json_entry_invalid_json: A JSON file in the backup archive cannot be parsed.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_domain_manifest_domain_id: A backup domain manifest is missing its data-scope identifier.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_domain_manifest_hash_or_d: A backup domain manifest is missing its data path or checksum.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_domain_manifest_numeric_f: A backup domain manifest contains invalid numeric fields.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_manifest_version_unsuppor: The backup manifest version is not supported.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_manifest_domains_array_re: The backup manifest data-scope list has an invalid format.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_attachments_manifest_arra: The attachment manifest has an invalid format.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_attachments_blob_entry_mi: The backup archive is missing an attachment file.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_attachments_blob_missing_: An attachment record is missing its file.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_serialized_archive_size_i: The backup archive size exceeds the limit.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_input_blob_invalid: The imported backup file is not a valid Blob.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_zip_load_failed: Failed to read the backup ZIP.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_manifest_file_missing: The backup ZIP is missing its manifest file.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_domain_descriptor_missing: The backup contains a data scope that is not registered in this version.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_domain_hash_mismatch: The backup domain checksum does not match.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_file_count_mismatch: The backup ZIP file count does not match the manifest.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_unexpected_file: The backup ZIP contains an unregistered file.
reasonCodes.backup_archive_parse_failed: Failed to parse the backup ZIP.
reasonCodes.backup_chat_messages_topic_id_missing: A chat message backup record is missing its topic ID.
reasonCodes.backup_chat_messages_array_required: Chat message backup data is not an array.
reasonCodes.backup_chat_messages_count_limit_exceede: Chat message count exceeds the backup limit.
reasonCodes.backup_memory_records_array_required: Memory backup data is not an array.
reasonCodes.backup_memory_records_record_invalid: Memory backup contains an invalid record.
reasonCodes.attachments_records_data_blob_like_missi: An attachment record is missing readable Blob data.
reasonCodes.attachments_records_size_mismatch: Attachment metadata size does not match the actual Blob size.
reasonCodes.attachments_records_missing_blob_record: A chat or workspace item references a missing attachment record.
reasonCodes.attachments_records_count_limit_exceeded: Attachment count exceeds the backup limit.
reasonCodes.attachments_records_item_size_limit_exce: A single attachment exceeds the backup size limit.
reasonCodes.attachments_records_total_size_limit_exc: Total attachment size exceeds the backup limit.
reasonCodes.attachments_records_selected_count_limit: Selected attachment count exceeds the backup limit.
reasonCodes.attachments_records_record_required: Attachment backup contains a non-object record.
reasonCodes.attachments_records_meta_record_required: Attachment metadata is not an object.
reasonCodes.attachments_records_non_empty_string_req: An attachment record is missing a required text field.
reasonCodes.attachments_records_finite_non_negative_: An attachment record contains an invalid numeric field.
reasonCodes.attachments_records_array_required: Attachment backup data is not an array.
reasonCodes.attachments_records_manifest_array_requi: Attachment manifest is not an array.

toast.dirPickerUnsupported: Directory picker is not supported (File System Access API unavailable).
toast.dirPermissionDenied: Write permission to the directory was not granted
toast.backupMissing: Backup snapshot content is missing (it may have been cleaned up)
toast.restored: Restored from a local backup snapshot (chat data refreshed)

webdav.title: WebDAV
webdav.targetFileDesc: Path is always a remote directory. Snapshot backup writes a ZIP in that directory; state sync writes olyq-sync-state.v1.json in the same directory.

manage.title: Choose WebDAV backup
manage.description: Select an Olyq ZIP snapshot from the WebDAV directory to restore.

webdav.disableStreamDesc: When enabled, load the file into memory before uploading. Helps with some WebDAV servers that don't support chunked uploads, but increases memory usage.

toast.restoreUrlMissing: No restorable WebDAV backup snapshot was found. Create a backup under the current WebDAV path first.
toast.restored: Restored from a WebDAV backup snapshot (chat data refreshed)

s3.title: S3-compatible storage
s3.description: Object storage compatible with the AWS S3 API, e.g. AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Alibaba OSS, Tencent COS, etc.

manage.title: Manage S3 backups
manage.description: View, restore, or delete backup snapshots on S3.

toast.restored: Restored from an S3 backup snapshot
